author: gb9t
content: Iteration 59: net/dsa/dsa-switch-drivers.md committed (1d69cc2, 201 lines). DSA per-switch drivers — every consumer router L2 switch (b53/bcm_sf2/mt7530/QCA8K/Realtek/Marvell/Lantiq), every industrial PoE switch, every automotive TSN switch (SJA1105 in Tesla/BMW/VW/Hyundai-Kia). ~97K LOC. Defenses: per-vendor tag parser strict, CPU port frame port-id validated, VLAN+FDB+MDB hw-offload size-capped, port mirroring CAP_NET_ADMIN (closes 'sniffing via port-mirror'), PoE PSE CAP_NET_ADMIN (closes 'damage non-PoE device'), SJA1105 TSN CAP_NET_ADMIN (automotive safety!), switch firmware update CAP_SYS_ADMIN + LOCKDOWN (closes 'unprivileged installs malicious switch firmware → covert traffic capture'). 59 docs / ~5.05M LOC. Crossed 5M LOC threshold. Next iteration: drivers/net/phy (PHY framework — every networking-capable system has PHY drivers).
